PI-2026-07-10-resource-aware-translation.request: Owner requested faster local execution using available hardware without wasteful workers, duplicate caches, subagents, or GitHub Actions.
PI-2026-07-10-resource-aware-translation.implementation: PC-0006 implemented one Cargo cache/output tree, a full-corpus all-confirmed-blocker planner, unknown-parameter peeling, weighted co-occurrence batches, a 24-worker materialized sweep, and a hash-only replay overlapped with compiler/planner/audit work. The measured core checkpoint fell from 56 to 37 seconds (33.93%) without weakening full local gates.
PI-2026-07-10-resource-aware-translation.constraints: Cap workers when serial finalization, disk I/O, or tail imbalance dominates; do not push or trigger GitHub Actions.
